raw_source_reread_reason: Parent batch already preserved the one-file orphan shell, the seq01-baseline-plus-deltas contract, the hidden T-axis, the strongest perturbation point, the non-runner-anchor rule, the family-separation seams, and the catalog-versus-evidence visibility split.
reasons_for_candidate_status: The orphan is the correct bounded one-file result-only packet and retains a distinctive seq01-baseline-plus-deltas contract.
The hidden T-axis and strongest perturbation point remain reusable only if they stay attached to the wider 128-case lattice.
The current orphan remains useful only if it stays separate from both the earlier local trajectory suite and the repo-top descendants.
Catalog visibility remains informative only if it is kept distinct from evidence admission.
reasons_for_quarantine: No current runner anchor is inferred where none is recoverable.
Delta encoding is not treated as missing sequence coverage.
The hidden T-axis is not collapsed out of the lattice.
The orphan is not merged into the earlier local suite.
The orphan is not merged into V4/V5 or treated as evidence-admitted.
